my_thoughts: Use a medicine/surgery analogy: a dangerous tool used carefully to expose its own risks. Expect a ?how so?? that invites the analogy.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student notes paradox (?Still, you must use the very craft you condemn to defend your view?)?resist_intellectually via highlights_paradox. They understand: apparent self-use of rhetoric. Structural_analogy/ME_03 reframes: like medicine harming to heal. Pattern: paradox noted ? analogy reframing queued. Confidence medium because analogies often trigger clarification.
visible_response: If I persuade, it is not as a pastry chef persuades children, but as a doctor speaking bitter truths.
